name: Hacktool Ruler
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Hacktool Ruler
SIGMA Description: This events that are generated when using the hacktool Ruler by Sensepost

False positives:
- Go utilities that use staaldraad awesome NTLM library

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4776 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ruler%') OR (("Event ID" IN('4624', '4625')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ruler%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Hacktool Ruler on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4776 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ruler%') OR (("Event ID" IN('4624', '4625')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ruler%')) AQL filter query

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
